title: Add conversation-state task tracker
description: Create a temporary JSON tracker in the repo root that lists all implementation tasks with descriptions and statuses. Update it as work progresses.

title: Inspect current conversation flow and SDK support
description: Verify the current SQLite-backed session flow and confirm the installed OpenAI Agents SDK supports OpenAI-managed conversations.

title: Add SQLite conversation control state
description: Extend the database schema and DB accessors to store active OpenAI conversation metadata, curated memory, and archive records.

title: Add conversation manager service
description: Implement a service that creates, loads, archives, and resets OpenAI conversations while keeping SQLite as the source of truth for control metadata.

title: Add phone-usable conversation commands
description: Add slash commands such as /reset and /memory so conversation lifecycle can be controlled from Telegram without local shell access.

title: Expose reset and memory tools to the agent
description: Add agent tools for querying conversation state and archiving/resetting the active conversation through the conversation manager.

title: Switch direct replies to OpenAI conversation-backed sessions
description: Replace SQLite session usage for direct reply turns with OpenAIConversationsSession, seeded and tracked by the conversation manager.

title: Repurpose memory summarization
description: Move summarizer output into curated memory fields used for reseeding instead of treating SQLite session items as the main conversation state.

title: Add automated tests
description: Add and update tests for DB state, conversation manager behavior, slash commands, and message processing with OpenAI conversation-backed sessions.

title: Run full test suite
description: Run the repository test suite and fix any regressions introduced by the conversation-state changes.

title: Commit checkpoint changes
description: Create git commits at meaningful implementation checkpoints so progress is durable and reviewable.

title: Push checkpoint commits
description: Push the checkpoint commits to the configured remote so the branch reflects the implementation progress.
